rationale.R1.1: The delegation to improve the draft centrally involves conceptual reconstruction to reframe the thesis and contribution for stronger impact.
rationale.R1.2: Verifying logical consistency is a central responsibility to ensure the argument chain holds in the improved draft.
rationale.R1.3: Aligning claims with reported evidence is central to validating that results support the conclusions effectively.
rationale.R1.6: Polishing writing at the sentence and paragraph level is load-bearing for enhancing the draft's overall quality and readability.
rationale.RX.1: Disclosing uncertainties in the draft's claims is central to responsible improvement of a research artifact.
rationale.RX.2: Avoiding overclaims is load-bearing to maintain the integrity and credibility of the improved draft.
rationale.RX.3: Adhering to the scope of the presented method and results is central to focused improvements.
rationale.RX.4: Avoiding downstream harms is peripheral but relevant given the mention of deployment in citizen-science applications.
rationale.RX.5: Ensuring provenance and traceability is peripheral in this draft lacking explicit references or data sources.
